title: Harris Seriously Good Paintbrush Set, 5 Brush Pack, 1 x 0.5, 1 x 1, 1 x 1.5, 2 x 2 Paint Brushes
features: Achieve Seriously Good results with our Seriously Good Walls and Ceilings paint brush set, containing all the brushes you need in one handy pack!
Say goodbye to frustrating bristle loss with our patented No-Loss technology, ensuring a smooth and efficient painting experience every time.
Perfect for cutting in around light switches and sockets, this set is ideal for all of your interior painting needs.
Designed specifically for use with emulsion paints, our specialised blend of synthetic filaments will give you the perfect finish every time.

Experience comfort and precision with our flexible handle, perfect for extended decorating sessions. Clean up is a breeze, simply rinse the brushes in water after use for easy preparation for future projects.
description: From the manufacturer Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush Set The Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brush Set is the perfect for a DIYer. The set contains all the brushes you need to tackle any painting project. The No-Loss technology ensures that you will never have to stop and remove bristles from your paintwork again. Designed specifically for use with emulsion paints, the specialised blend of synthetic filaments allows for great results every time. The set is perfect for cutting-in around light switches, sockets when using masking tape. For cutting-in around light switches, sockets when using masking tape. For use with emulsion paint Easy to clean Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brushes for Walls and Ceilings | 5 Brush Pack | 0.5", 1", 1.5", 2" This set contains all the paint brushes you need to tackle each room in your home This brush set contains: 1 x 0.5" Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 1 x 1" Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 1 x 1.5" Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 2 x 2" Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush Achieve seriously good results Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush Set A brush set for achieving a professional finish on Walls & Ceilings No-Loss Technology Patented No-Loss technology means no bristle loss & advanced synthetic filaments give a seriously good finish. The perfect set for cutting in This 5 brush pack contains brushes in the sizes 0.5" 1", 1.5", and 2" Specialized for use with emulsion paint. Designed for use on interior surfaces for cutting in around light switches, fittings and plug sockets when using masking tape. The Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brush Set is a must-have for any DIY enthusiast, as it has all the brushes you need to tackle any painting project. The patented No-Loss technology ensures that you will never have to stop and remove bristles from your paintwork again, making your painting experience smooth and efficient. The set is specifically designed for use with emulsion paints and features specialised blend of synthetic filaments, allowing for a perfect finish every time. The flexible handle provides comfort during extended decorating sessions and makes it easy to maneuver and control the brush. Clean up is a breeze, simply rinse the brushes in water after use. The set is perfect for cutting-in around light switches, sockets and other interior areas when using masking tape, With Harris, you can be sure that you are getting a high-quality paint brush set that will stand the test of time. Q: What makes the Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brush Set unique? A: The patented No-Loss technology eliminates bristle loss, so you can focus on your painting project and achieve seriously good results. Additionally, the set is designed specifically for use with emulsion paints and the specialised blend of synthetic filaments gives a smooth finish. Q: How does the Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brush Set make cutting-in around light switches and sockets easier? A: The set is ideal for cutting-in around light switches, sockets and other interior areas when using masking tape, making it easy to achieve a precise and clean finish. Q: How many brushes are included in the Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brush Set? A: The set includes 5 brushes in various sizes of 0.5", 1", 1.5", and 2" to tackle any painting project. Q: How do I clean the brushes after use? A: Clean up is easy, simply rinse the brushes in water after use for easy preparation for future projects. Q: Are the brushes comfortable to hold? A: Yes, the flexible handle provides comfort during extended decorating sessions, allowing you to work efficiently and comfortably. Q: Is the Harris Seriously Good No Loss Paint Brush Set easy to use? A: Yes, the set is easy to use and maneuver, making it perfect for both experienced painters and beginners.
